2026-04-21FINCanada Revenue Agency ActAppointment of a director of the Board of Management of the Canada Revenue AgencyAppointment of André Carroll of Moncton, New Brunswick, to be a director of the Board of Management of the Canada Revenue Agency, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the Board of Management of the Canada Revenue Agency
precis: Appointment of André Carroll of Moncton, New Brunswick, to be a director of the Board of Management of the Canada Revenue Agency, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.
